projectType: Node.js CLI parser, report, and integration lab
completed: Created package.json with package metadata, CLI bin mapping, and minimal npm test command.
Created README.md documenting current scope, usage, and pending parser/report/docs work.
Validated the checkpoint skeleton with npm test and a direct placeholder CLI run.
Implemented src/args.mjs parser support for --input, --format, --help, unknown options, and missing option values.
Added tests/args.test.mjs parser-only coverage and wired npm test to run only those parser tests.
Updated README.md checkpoint status to show checkpoint 2 complete while leaving report generation and integration work pending.
Added fixtures/sample-repo.json with representative commit, author, and changed-file data.
Implemented src/report.mjs with deterministic repository summary creation plus text and JSON formatting.
Added tests/report.test.mjs coverage for stable summary data, text output, JSON output, and report errors.
Extended npm test to run both parser and report test suites.
Updated README.md checkpoint status to show checkpoint 3 complete while leaving CLI integration and docs/examples.md pending.
Wired src/index.mjs into src/args.mjs and src/report.mjs for real CLI execution.
Added CLI support for --help, required --input, text output, JSON output, input read failures, invalid JSON, and unsupported report formats.
Added tests/integration.test.mjs end-to-end coverage through node src/index.mjs.
Updated npm test to run parser, report, and CLI integration suites.
Added docs/examples.md with successful usage and failure examples.
Expanded README.md with usage commands, failure examples, completed checkpoint status, and documentation links.
Updated tests/integration.test.mjs invalid-JSON coverage to use the existing in-project README.md file instead of creating an OS temporary file outside multi-commit-cli-lab-20260716.

validationDetails.npmTest: PASS: npm test ran node --test tests/args.test.mjs tests/report.test.mjs tests/integration.test.mjs with 19 passing tests after the invalid-JSON integration test was constrained to in-project input.
validationDetails.loopStateJson: PASS: LOOP_STATE.json parsed successfully during inspection.
validationDetails.cliSmoke: PASS: node src/index.mjs --input fixtures/sample-repo.json generated a readable text report from the bundled fixture.
validationDetails.docs: PASS: README.md and docs/examples.md now document installation-free usage, options, input format, examples, and implemented failure behavior.
